title: Brightness Filter
description: Restricts mob spawning based on light level at the spawn location. Hostile mobs typically spawn in darkness (light level 0-7), while passive mobs spawn in brighter areas.

adjust_for_weather.description: When true, brightness is adjusted for the current weather (rain/thunder reduce light levels).

max.description: Maximum light level (0-15) at which this entity can spawn.

min.description: Minimum light level (0-15) at which this entity can spawn.
